creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Brad. 

 - Are you able to maintain this port?
 - Can you confirm it passes QA (portlint -AC, poudriere)
 - If it has tests, can you add TEST_DEPENDS and a (do-)test target for QA. Let me know if you need help getting this going.
 - Strip leading A from COMMENT.

If you need ports commit approval, happy to provide that post review.

^Triage: Reporter is committer, assign accordingly
